_meta.description: University data for UK, Ireland, and Dubai — structured for easy filtering and retrieval by the Fateh Education AI counselling bot.
_meta.currency_note: UK fees in GBP. Ireland fees in EUR. Dubai fees in AED with GBP equivalent. Use live_metrics for INR conversion.
_meta.cost_resolution: Living costs now resolved from cost_of_living.json based on city. Use cost_manager.py to get costs.

universities.notable: One of highest-ranked universities accepting 3-year Indian degrees. Strong Indian alumni network.
#2 QS World. STEM powerhouse. Very competitive. Apply by January for competitive programs.

universities.full_name: London School of Economics and Political Science
universities.notable: World-leading for Economics, Finance, and Social Sciences. Central London. Very competitive.
Top 5 in UK for Law. Located in heart of London. Strong for health sciences and humanities.
Top-10 UK university. Beautiful historic city. Strong for AI and Informatics. 3-year Indian degree accepted.

scholarships_offered.name: Edinburgh India Scholarship
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Indian citizen, on-campus PG Masters — automatically considered

scholarships_offered.name: Women in STEM South Asia Scholarship
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Female, South Asian (India/Pakistan/Sri Lanka/Bangladesh/Nepal), STEM Masters at Edinburgh

universities.notable: Large Indian community. Very affordable outside London. Alliance Manchester Business School is world-renowned.

scholarships_offered.name: Global Futures Scholarship (South Asia)
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Indian/Bangladeshi/Pakistani/Sri Lankan students, merit-based, UG and Masters

universities.notable: WBS (Warwick Business School) is triple-accredited. Strong for Finance and Business. More affordable than London.
Beautiful city. Strong Engineering and Sciences. Good value vs London. GREAT Scholarship participating.
Second largest city in UK. Large Indian community. Good employment outcomes. Affordable living.
Vibrant student city. Good Indian community. Strong for Data Science and Business. Affordable living.
Ranked #1 UK university for student experience. Very affordable city. Strong engineering programs.
Beautiful campus. Good for Finance and Business. Affordable city. January intake available for some courses.

scholarships_offered.name: Nottingham Developing Solutions Scholarship
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Developing country students including India, merit-based

universities.notable: Very accessible. January intake available. Good for students with 50-60% profiles. Reasonable fees.

courses.name: MSc Data Science and Computational Intelligence

universities.notable: Cheapest cost of living in UK. Russell Group university. GREAT Scholarship participating. No visa to visit Republic of Ireland.
Best in UK for Petroleum Engineering. Campus also in Dubai. Strong industry links. Edinburgh campuses.
Russell Group. Affordable Scottish city. Strong research university. Large international student community.
Most affordable Russell Group in UK. Growing tech hub. Capital city of Wales. Low cost of living.
Ireland's most prestigious and oldest university. Heart of Dublin. Internationally recognised degree. 2-year post-study stay-back.

scholarships_offered.name: GOI-IES (Government of Ireland)
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Non-EU/EEA students, Masters/PhD, must apply via HEA portal

universities.notable: Ireland's largest research university. Ireland's #1 for graduate employment. Google, Meta, LinkedIn, Microsoft all nearby in Dublin's Silicon Docks.

scholarships_offered.name: GOI-IES (Government of Ireland)
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Non-EU/EEA students, Masters/PhD, must apply via HEA portal

universities.notable: More affordable than Dublin. Cork is Ireland's 2nd city. Lower living costs. Apple and Amazon offices in Cork. Very welcoming to Indian students.

scholarships_offered.name: GOI-IES (Government of Ireland)
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Non-EU/EEA students, Masters/PhD, must apply via HEA portal

universities.notable: Most affordable cost of living in Ireland. Beautiful Atlantic coast city. Strong in Medicine and Engineering. Lower fees than Dublin.

scholarships_offered.name: GOI-IES (Government of Ireland)
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Non-EU/EEA students, Masters/PhD, must apply via HEA portal

universities.notable: Most affordable major Dublin university. Free application. High acceptance rate. Good for 50-60% profiles. Strong industry links.

scholarships_offered.name: GOI-IES (Government of Ireland)
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Non-EU/EEA students, Masters/PhD, must apply via HEA portal

universities.notable: Most affordable Irish university. Very strong industry co-op programs. Good for tech roles. GOI-IES scholarship eligible.

courses.name: MSc Computer Science and Information Technology (AI)

scholarships_offered.name: GOI-IES (Government of Ireland)
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Non-EU/EEA students, Masters/PhD — no deposit required for GOI-IES applicants

universities.notable: Lowest fees of any Dublin institution. Very accessible entry requirements. Good for students with lower profiles or backlogs. 2-year stay-back still applies.
Scottish Russell Group equivalent campus. Same UK degree as Edinburgh campus. First overseas UK university in DIAC (2005). 5-star KHDA rating. No income tax in UAE.
universities.visa_info: UAE Student Visa sponsored by university. No minimum bank balance requirement.
universities.post_study: Switch to UAE work visa — employer sponsorship required. No automatic post-study work right.

scholarships_offered.name: Heriot-Watt Dubai Merit Scholarship (UG/PG)
scholarships_offered.amount_note: Tuition fee reduction based on academic performance
scholarships_offered.eligibility: Merit-based — % discount depends on grade band

universities.notable: More accessible entry requirements than other Dubai campuses. UK degree awarded. Good for students with 55% profiles.
universities.visa_info: UAE Student Visa sponsored by university. No minimum bank balance requirement.
universities.post_study: Switch to UAE work visa — employer sponsorship required.

universities.notable: Full Russell Group university campus. Identical UK degree. Strong for Finance, Engineering, Law. Higher fees than other Dubai campuses.
universities.visa_info: UAE Student Visa sponsored by university. No minimum bank balance requirement.
universities.post_study: Switch to UAE work visa — employer sponsorship required.

universities.notable: Australian university. Strong for MBA and Engineering. AACSB accredited Business School. Flexible payment plans.
universities.visa_info: UAE Student Visa sponsored by university. No minimum bank balance requirement.
universities.post_study: Switch to UAE work visa — employer sponsorship required.

post_study_work_rights.UK: Graduate Route Visa — 2 years after Masters (18 months for some pre-Nov 2024 courses)
post_study_work_rights.Ireland: Third Level Graduate Programme — 2 years for Honours/Masters, 1 year for others
post_study_work_rights.UAE_Dubai: No automatic post-study work right — employer sponsorship required for UAE work visa
